Tauri Linux pins glib 0.18; Pulse never calls the affected VariantStrIter API.
The unmaintained proc-macro-error crate is build-time-only through Tauri's GTK3 bindings.
The unmaintained fxhash crate is transitive through Tauri's build-time HTML parser.
